name: switch-timer-homeassistant
description: Home Assistant custom integration for timed entity switching

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['custom_components/switch_timer']; const removed=['src','dist','packages','custom_components/switch_timer/www']; for (const path of required) { if (!fs.existsSync(path)) throw new Error('Missing required path: ' + path); } for (const path of removed) { if (fs.existsSync(path)) throw new Error('Obsolete frontend path still exists: ' + path); } console.log('Integration-only layout verified');"
scripts.lint: python -c "import ast; from pathlib import Path; [ast.parse(path.read_text(), filename=str(path)) for root in ('custom_components/switch_timer', 'tests') for path in Path(root).rglob('*.py')]; print('Python source parsed successfully')"
